summary: implement must GENERATE src/lib/cms/notion.ts (the mutation-hardened Notion CMS parsing layer) from a code-redacted plan, turning 14 hardened oracle tests green without editing the oracle.

mutationOptional.note: Secondary signal that the generated code is real, not a test-passing shim. Expensive; run only on a green result.

contaminationControls.memoryIsolation: Fixture path != real repo path, so CasaDosCaminhos project memory (11 files, 5 spoilers) does not load.
contaminationControls.historyIsolation: Fresh git init; git log -- src/lib/cms/notion.ts shows only the stubbed baseline. Original impl unreachable via git show.
contaminationControls.planRedacted: All implementation code fences stripped; Test Contract + Success Criteria kept verbatim from the real plan's Phase 2+3.

validated.pending: Whether `claude -p "/rpiv:implement <plan>"` fires the skill headless (disable-model-invocation:true) — validate with one cheap run before trusting a full billed run; fall back to an explicit Skill-tool prompt if the slash form no-ops.
